title: tephrosia rigida
intro: Tephrosia rigida, also known as the Horsefly tree or Stinging tree, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which can be attributed to its alkaloid content. The health benefits of Tephrosia rigida include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve kidney function. Tephrosia rigida can be prepared as a herbal remedy through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
